channel.title: UK GDPR on The Security Gazette
channel.description: Recent content in UK GDPR on The Security Gazette

item.title: CCTV for Apartment Blocks and Flats — Legal Requirements and Best Practice Guide 2026
item.description: Essential guidance on CCTV installation in apartment blocks and flats: planning permission, communal area coverage, data protection obligations, and resident privacy rights under UK law.

item.title: CCTV for Hospitals and NHS Facilities — Compliance and Security Guide 2026
item.description: How NHS trusts and private hospitals can deploy CCTV lawfully: patient privacy protections, A&E security, car park surveillance, and compliance with UK GDPR and the Data (Use and Access) Act 2025.
